prompts.title: Normalize and Structure Source Content
prompts.body: Transform raw content into a structured pedagogical brief: key themes, misconceptions, prerequisite knowledge, and concept dependencies.

versions.body: Transform raw content into a structured pedagogical brief: key themes, misconceptions, prerequisite knowledge, and concept dependencies.

prompts.title: Generate Measurable Learning Outcomes
prompts.body: Create measurable learning outcomes aligned to learner level and context; include success criteria per outcome.

versions.body: Create measurable learning outcomes aligned to learner level and context; include success criteria per outcome.

prompts.title: Build Learning Sequence
prompts.body: Design a pedagogically coherent sequence from outcomes, with rationale, pacing, and transitions.

versions.body: Design a pedagogically coherent sequence from outcomes, with rationale, pacing, and transitions.

prompts.title: Design Learning Activities
prompts.body: Create activities mapped to outcomes and sequence stage; include modality, facilitator instructions, and estimated time.

versions.body: Create activities mapped to outcomes and sequence stage; include modality, facilitator instructions, and estimated time.

prompts.title: Create Outcome-Aligned Assessment
prompts.body: Generate formative and summative assessment tasks aligned with outcomes; provide answer guidance and rubric criteria.

versions.body: Generate formative and summative assessment tasks aligned with outcomes; provide answer guidance and rubric criteria.

prompts.title: Draft Instructor Facilitation Notes
prompts.body: Write facilitator notes for each sequence stage, including timing, prompts, adaptations, and common misconceptions.

versions.body: Write facilitator notes for each sequence stage, including timing, prompts, adaptations, and common misconceptions.

prompts.title: Generate Learner Materials
prompts.body: Produce learner-facing handout or guide with concise explanations, activities, and self-checks.

versions.body: Produce learner-facing handout or guide with concise explanations, activities, and self-checks.

prompts.title: QA Alignment and Constraints
prompts.body: Audit outputs for outcome alignment, accessibility, language clarity, and time-on-task limits. Return corrective recommendations.

versions.body: Audit outputs for outcome alignment, accessibility, language clarity, and time-on-task limits. Return corrective recommendations.

workflows.name: Pedagogy Complex Workflow (8 Steps)
workflows.description: Transforms raw source content into aligned instructor and learner materials with QA.
workflows.artefacts: Raw content, learner profile, session goals, delivery mode, required standards
workflows.scopeAndConstraints: Short course module; target learner effort 90 minutes; plain language; accessibility-aware outputs.

steps.title: Normalize source content
steps.notes: Extract themes, dependencies, and likely misconceptions.

steps.title: Define learning outcomes
steps.notes: Generate 4-6 measurable outcomes with success criteria.

steps.title: Build learning sequence
steps.notes: Create stage-based flow with progression rationale.

steps.title: Design activities
steps.notes: Map each activity to outcomes and estimated duration.

steps.title: Create assessment pack
steps.notes: Ensure full outcome coverage with rubric-ready criteria.

steps.title: Draft facilitation notes
steps.notes: Include timing, prompts, alternatives, and risk points.

steps.title: Generate learner materials
steps.notes: Keep language clear and include short self-checks.

steps.title: Quality assurance
steps.notes: Check alignment, accessibility, effort limits, and suggest fixes.
